description: You are the store manager of Riverside Electronics (3100 River Road, Austin TX 78741, (512) 555-0342), launching the store today in Copper Point of Sale. Complete the full grand opening workflow: Configure a sales tax named TX Sales Tax at 8.25%. Configure the receipt header with the store name, address, and phone number, and set the receipt footer to Thank you for shopping with us! Import products from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\store_inventory.csv into the system. Add customer Jordan Hayes with email jordan.hayes@techstart.io, phone (512) 555-0199, company TechStart Inc. Process sales: Sale 1 sell Apple AirPods Pro and Apple Lightning Cable 1m, pay with Cash. Sale 2 create a coupon named GRAND10 for $10 off, then sell Samsung Galaxy Buds FE to customer Jordan Hayes with the coupon applied, pay with Credit Card. Sale 3 sell JBL Clip 4 Speaker with Cash, then void this entire transaction. Sale 4 sell Google Pixel Buds A-Series and USB-C to USB-C Cable 6ft, pay with Cash. Export today's Sales Report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\daily_sales_report.csv. Finally, create C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\opening_day_summary.txt containing the store name, the configured tax rate, the number of items imported, the number of completed sales, the number of voided sales, and the total pre-tax revenue from all completed sales.

metadata.receipt_footer: Thank you for shopping with us!

transactions.items: Apple AirPods Pro x1, Apple Lightning Cable 1m x1
Samsung Galaxy Buds FE x1 (GRAND10 coupon applied)
Google Pixel Buds A-Series x1, USB-C to USB-C Cable 6ft x1
